title: The Saruyama Alliance Gets Involved
description: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Bellamy, Shojo, Luffy. The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: But... Well, there! See, it's impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: What, so we CAN make it!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: W-what? You wanna go or somethin'!?

summary: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
